name: A New Wave Young People's Group
notes:
This is an open meeting for all young people, that meaning young in age OR young at heart. We are a meeting that welcomes all and any wanting to attend. This group is based out of Cape Cod but is open to people from anywhere in the world to attend. The schedule goes like this Friday- As Bill Sees it, Saturday- Daily Reflections, Sundays- Small Reading from the Big Book. The meeting does not close at 9 pm, it is followed by an after party and will remain open until all members that would like to share have had the opportunity to do so. Please join us :).
